Export customs document, 10EUR/extra HS Code

charges.remarks: All-in rate including Ocean Freight, Origin Local Charges, Trucking Fee, B/L Fee, Documentation Fee, Export Customs Clearance (valid for one HS code per container; additional 15 EUR per HS code per container applies thereafter). Excludes: VGM Weighing Fee, Destination Local Charges, Demurrage, Storage, Duty, Tax. Spot Rate. Subject to approval. PSS/GRI adjustments may apply after booking. Weekly fuel surcharge may apply for trucking. Truck detention free time is 2 hours, then 50 EUR per each half an hour. Rates subject to space/equipment availability and minute-to-minute change; can be secured via booking (penalty for amendment/cancellation).
